description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in OpenBASE Alpha 0.6 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the root_prefix parameter to (1) index.php, (2) email_subscribe.php, (3) download.php, or (4) development.php.
